parameters.query: SELECT * FROM {{ $env.JOBS_FUNNEL_TABLE }} WHERE status IN ('pending', 'error') AND retry_count < 3 ORDER BY CASE description_quality WHEN 'good' THEN 0 WHEN 'unknown' THEN 1 WHEN 'poor' THEN 2 WHEN 'empty' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, crawled_at ASC LIMIT 80

parameters.jsCode:
// Check if more pending jobs remain — loop back if so
return [{ json: { _trigger: 'check_more' } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, title, company, location FROM {{ $env.JOBS_FUNNEL_TABLE }} WHERE status = 'analyzed' AND crawled_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY crawled_at DESC LIMIT 200
